title: pabstiella pterophora
intro: Pabstiella pterophora, a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, belongs to the subtribe Pabstiellinae within the orchid family. The medicinal properties of Pabstiella pterophora have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and promote healing. Pabstiella pterophora can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
